user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: The HUD (score, level, distance, combo) only displays when gamePhase is "PLAYING", but the user wants it to remain visible when paused. Currently there's no pause overlay being drawn (which is good per the feedback), but the HUD disappears when paused.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Modify the renderUI() function to show the HUD when the game is in either "PLAYING" or "PAUSED" state, instead of only "PLAYING".
